source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ Battery Recharger/[H&abyz] Battery Recharger 자료/4. DEPS126002_BOM_CODE_20250115.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Bill of materials listing components, vendors, quantities, and locations for DEPS126002 battery recharger assemblies.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports product documentation by identifying electronic, PCB, case, label, packaging, and mechanical parts used in the DEPS126002 battery recharger.
keyPoints: The BOM includes a main recharger PCB identified as DEPS126002/RECHARGER.
The BOM includes battery sub-assemblies identified as DEPS126002/BATTERY_SUB1 and DEPS126002/BATTERY_SUB2.
The BOM lists component types including capacitors, diodes, ICs, LEDs, inductors, MOSFETs, resistors, TVS devices, USB-C connector, PCBs, case parts, labels, PE foam, LED pipes, and screws.
Vendor or manufacturer names appear for many parts, including TAIYO YUDEN, SAMSUNG, WALSIN, VISHAY, ONSEMI, TI, INFINEON, LITTELFUSE, TE, 3M, and others.
